tables.caption: Fee Table: Other fees for using PayPal Online Card Payment Services

cells.text: If PayPal determines that your Account receives, or is likely to receive a disproportionately higher number of customer complaints, Reversals, Chargebacks, Claims, or other indicators of a serious level of risk, PayPal may increase the percentage components of your Transaction Fees after giving you 30 days prior notice of the increase.
Optional service for Advanced Credit and Debit Card Payments

For each account verification request (for all Direct Payment API or Virtual Terminal card account verification transactions (Visa and MasterCard only). For the avoidance of doubt, this does not include Uncaptured Authorization Transactions.
If you do not implement Express Checkout as required, the percentage components of your Transaction Fees may increase after giving you 30 days prior notice. (Website Payments Pro & Virtual Terminal)
Optional Service for Website Payments Pro & Virtual Terminal
For each successful but uncaptured authorization transaction via Direct Payment API or Virtual Terminal

tables.caption: Fee Table: Other Fees

cells.text: Bank Return on Withdrawal/Transfer out of PayPal
This fee is charged when a withdrawal/transfer out of PayPal is attempted by a user and it fails because incorrect bank account information or delivery information is provided.

links.text: Bank Return on Withdrawal/Transfer out of PayPal Table below

cells.text: See Bank Return on Withdrawal/Transfer out of PayPal Table below.
Credit Card and Debit Card Confirmation(s)

Some users, in order to increase their sending limit or as PayPal may determine, may be charged a Credit Card and Debit Card Link and Confirmation fee. This amount will be refunded when you successfully complete the credit card or debit card verification process.

links.text: Credit Card and Debit Card Link and Confirmation Table below

cells.text: See Credit Card and Debit Card Link and Confirmation Table below.

This is a payment between UK users (i) made through a third party’s product or service and funded exclusively using either (or both) balance or eCheque and (ii) for which the PayPal Business Payment fee applies. The PayPal Business Payment fee is paid by the recipient, unless it is disclosed to the sender before payment is sent that the sender must pay this fee.
2.00 GBP per transaction in GBP0.50 USD per transaction in USD

This fee will apply for requests of information relating to why we had reasonable justification to refuse your payment order. We will not charge you for records requested in connection with your good-faith assertion of an error in your PayPal account.

links.text: UK PayPal Business Debit Mastercard Cardholder Agreement

cells.text: UK Business Debit Card – Cash withdrawal feeUse of the UK Business Debit Card is subject to eligibility, application, approval by PayPal and your acceptance of the terms of the UK PayPal Business Debit Mastercard Cardholder Agreement.
The fee applies to cash withdrawals at an ATM (inside and outside the UK). The ATM provider may charge additional fees.
